description_long: This is a futuristic, tactical shotgun with a sleek, angular design and a predominantly white and gray color scheme accented by blue highlights. The body features a robust receiver with integrated digital or electronic components, possibly for advanced targeting or ammunition tracking. The magazine is curved and semi-transparent, suggesting a high-capacity, detachable design. The stock is adjustable and features a padded buttplate for recoil absorption, while the grip is ergonomic with textured surfaces for secure handling. The barrel is long and fitted with a large muzzle brake or compensator, and there is a prominent scope or sighting device mounted on top. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer materials, giving it a modern, lightweight yet durable appearance.
description: A futuristic, high-tech shotgun with a white, gray, and blue color scheme, featuring a long barrel, adjustable stock, and advanced sighting system.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, curved magazine, adjustable stock, and mounted scope.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the barrel alignment, sighting device, and overall slim profile.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the ergonomic grip, magazine, and detailed receiver components.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle brake, barrel opening, and symmetrical design elements.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a long, vented muzzle brake
attribute_stock_type: adjustable full stock with padded buttplate
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with reinforced edges and slight finger groove
